content: Project SIHRE Platform created via AI chat onboarding

Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage) — Fastest path to auth, storage, and full-text search with a single hosted service. Aligns with Next.js on Vercel. Avoids managing a separate auth service. Upgrade path to self-hosted is clear.

CMS: MDX files in GitHub + Conductor artifact manager — Content is already in Markdown. Conductor manages the editorial workflow internally. Public site reads from MDX files version-controlled in the SIHRE repo — no third-party CMS dependency, no vendor lock-in.

Public/private boundary enforcement: Classification field on every artifact, enforced at API and route level — PUBLIC_PRIVATE_MAP.md defines 11 private-sensitive files whose disclosure would compromise NeuroFusion-13 IP and provisional patent strategy. This boundary is non-negotiable and must be structural, not procedural.
Naming: SIHRE throughout — no abbreviation to SIRE — SIRE is an error. The canonical acronym is SIHRE (Self-Improving Heterogeneous Reasoning Ensemble). Branding consistency required from P0 forward.

Monetization sequencing: Consulting and research packs before SaaS (P6 before P8) — Per Monetization_Roadmap.md, Architecture Audits ($7.5k–$15k) and research packs are immediate revenue with no SaaS build required. Consulting funds the Control Plane build. Never build P8 before validating demand through P6.

Analytics: Plausible Analytics — Privacy-first, GDPR-compliant, no cookie banner required. Consistent with SIHRE's governance and trust positioning. Avoids Google Analytics' credibility risk for a research-oriented brand.
